prompt:
Given the case description, identify the MOST relevant CRISPR delivery method from the options below:

a. Plasmid Transfection
b. Lentivirus/Retrovirus
c. RNP/mRNA electroporation
d. RNP/mRNA microinjection
e. mRNA LNP
f. AAV

Category: Cell line
Case Description: I hope to edit HEK293T cell line

Please provide your response as follows:
- Most relevant method (select one letter a-f):
raw_response:
Thinking and reasoning:
HEK293T is a standard, highly transfectable human cell line frequently edited using plasmid transfection (lipid-based or chemical). While RNP electroporation can give faster editing and fewer off-targets, for routine HEK293T editing the simplest and most common approach is plasmid transfection.

Plan:
1. [ ] Evaluate cell line properties and common delivery methods for HEK293T.
2. [ ] Select the most relevant delivery method from the provided options.

Step 1: evaluate — completed.
1. [✓] Evaluate cell line properties and common delivery methods for HEK293T. (HEK293T = highly transfectable; plasmid transfection commonly used)

Step 2: select — completed.
1. [✓] Evaluate cell line properties and common delivery methods for HEK293T. (HEK293T = highly transfectable; plasmid transfection commonly used)
2. [✓] Select the most relevant delivery method from the provided options.

<solution>
- Most relevant method (select one letter a-f): a
</solution>
